name: calendar_create
description: Create a new event on your Google Calendar with summary, times, location, description, and attendees.

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID to create the event in (default: 'primary'). Use an email address for shared calendars.

start_time.description: Event start time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2024-03-20T14:00:00-07:00' or '2024-03-20' for all-day events)

end_time.description: Event end time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2024-03-20T15:00:00-07:00' or '2024-03-21' for all-day events)

attendees.description: List of attendee email addresses to invite
